16060 "[i:year:2012]"
16061 "recap"
16062 "The start of my photography. I had an Olympus XZ-1 and a bridge camera; both of which I loved and neither of which were really great cameras. I didn't take many pictures this year; a few cliche waterfall-but-slow-shutter pictures not fit for upload."
16060 16061 16062
16063 "[i:year:2013]"
16064 "I started to capture pictures of the interesting places I visited. It's also the first year I took a passable photo."
16063 16061 16064
16065 "[i:year:2015]"
16065 16061 31
16066 "[i:year:2016]"
16067 "A big year for me. I started travelling; while sitting in a cafe in Amsterdam a pride parade passed by. Not long afterwards I came out as transgender. I also started taking wildlife photos, a niche I've preferred since then."
16066 16061 16067
16068 "[i:year:2017]"
16069 "Lots of travel, especially around Ireland."
16068 16061 16069
16070 "[i:year:2018]"
16071 "In 2018 I left Europe for the first time, though I have to admit I find America is much pleasant (visually) outside its major cities."
16070 16061 16071
16072 "[i:year:2019]"
16073 "I was indoors for most of 2019, as was everyone else."
16072 16061 16073
16074 "[i:year:2020]"
16075 "Another pandemic year. I did get outside, occassionally, to take some wildlife photos."
16074 16061 16075
16076 "[i:year:2021]"
16077 "I re-visited America, to the mid-west. Chicago was monumental; as someone used to smaller European cities the _extent_ of the city was jaw-dropping. Despite my pre-conceptions, the biodiversity in the US is impressive; birds of prey, sandhill cranes, hummingbirds and woodpeckers were common. Wildlife was more present than in the parts of Europe i was used to."
16076 16061 16077
16078 "[i:year:2022]"
16079 "A big year for travel. I visited London (possibly my favourite city, it's impossible to be bored there), and saw more the rural parts of Wisconsin. The visit to the International Crane Foundation was a highlight; they're really charming birds"
16078 16061 16079
16080 "[i:year:2023]"
16081 "Berlin was a ghost-town when I visited, in the best way. The city was snowed under; I missed virtually every noteworthy sight (the museum's, Aleksanderplatz, dozens other), but I had a good time traipsing around in the snow and visiting Christmas markets."
16080 16061 16081
16082 "[i:year:2024]"
16083 "I saw some of the most beautiful sights on earth this year. I'm really fond of moorish architecture & islamic tilework; Granada, Seville, and Córdoba were jaw-dropping places."
16082 16061 16083
16084 "[i:year:2025]"
16085 "A varied year; I saw the old castle in Conwy, Slovenia, a run across Iberia (seeing more moorish architecture), and the rainforests of Anaga in Tenerife."
